title: NTI MARKSMAN Portable 35KG / 75LB Travel Bags LUGGAGE Scale | 1 Meter Tape Measure | Suitcase | Holidays | Analogue | Traditional | Hook Weight | Home & Office | Parcel | Package | DIY | UK Free P&P
features: Quality Product To Suit Your Daily Needs.
This set of Travel Luggage Scales are ideal for weighing suitcases and cabin luggage to make sure they comply with airline restrictions and to avoid excess baggage charges.
Each baggage scale approximately weights up to 35kg / 75LB and includes a luggage hook and a 1 metre tape measure.
